purpose: Close four reviewed exchange candidates after promotion through D-1000 BX25.

entries.notes: BX25 promotes Lunarbase after current first-party application review and independent Base and Monad TVL, fee, revenue, and DEX-volume verification. All deployments remain one entity.

BX25 promotes Lithos after first-party Plasma DEX documentation and independent current TVL, fee, revenue, and DEX-volume verification. The application URL remains live_unverified because direct response verification was blocked.

BX25 promotes Monday Trade after first-party Monad spot and perpetual DEX documentation and independent current TVL, fee, spot-volume, and perpetual-volume verification. All product surfaces remain one entity.
BX25 promotes Purps after current first-party Monad swap application review and independent non-zero recent DEX-volume verification. Activity is thin, so confidence remains medium.
